title: Hey MAX, show me today's tasks

messages.content:
Hello! I'm **MAX**, your Empire AI Assistant.

_Tip: Ctrl+V to paste images · Shift+Enter for newlines_
Hey MAX, show me today's tasks
Hey MAX, show me today's tasks

I don't have direct access to your tasks database in this conversation, but let me help you check!

## 📋 Today's Tasks

There are a few ways to view your tasks:

### Option 1 — Visit the Tasks Page
Head to **[http://localhost:3009/tasks](http://localhost:3009/tasks)** on your Founder Dashboard.

### Option 2 — Query the API
I can help you pull tasks via the backend API:

```bash
curl http://localhost:8000/api/v1/tasks
```

### Option 3 — Tell Me What's On Your Plate
If you want, just tell me what you're working on today and I'll help you **prioritize, delegate to the right desk, or knock them out one by one.**

---

> **Note:** It looks like there may have been a connection issue with the earlier messages — I wasn't receiving them properly. Everything looks good now! 

What would you like to tackle first today, RG? 🚀
